member.name: M:FileManager.WebUI.Controllers.FileController.Upload(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: file type is invalid or file is malware.

member.name: M:FileManager.WebUI.Controllers.FileController.Download(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download a file by it's id
member.response: return notfound if file did not exist

member.name: M:FileManager.WebUI.Controllers.FileController.DownloadAll(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download a file by it's id
member.response: return notfound if file did not exist
